sentences.target: Je recherche un appartement près du métro.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʁəʃɛʁʃ œ̃n apɑʁtmɑ̃ pʁɛ dy metʁo/

translations.fr: Je recherche un appartement près du métro.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʁəʃɛʁʃ œ̃n apɑʁtmɑ̃ pʁɛ dy metʁo/
translations.en: I'm looking for an apartment near the subway.
translations.es: Busco un apartamento cerca del metro.
translations.de: Ich suche eine Wohnung in der Nähe der U-Bahn.
translations.it: Sto cercando un appartamento vicino alla metropolitana.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找地铁附近的公寓。
translations.ru: Я ищу квартиру рядом с метро.
translations.pt: Estou procurando um apartamento perto do metrô.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một căn hộ gần tàu điện ngầm.
translations.ar: أبحث عن شقة بالقرب من المترو.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een appartement in de buurt van de metro.
translations.hi: मैं मेट्रो के पास एक अपार्टमेंट ढूंढ रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Ψάχνω ένα διαμέρισμα κοντά στο μετρό.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en leilighet nær T-banen.
translations.id: Saya mencari apartemen dekat stasiun kereta bawah tanah.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en lägenhet nära tunnelbanan.
translations.ro: Caut un apartament aproape de metrou.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en lejlighed tæt på metroen.
translations.ja: 地下鉄の近くでアパートを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking a direct object.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determiners the noun 'appartement'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'recherche'.
Adverb used in the fixed prepositional expression 'près de', indicating proximity.
Contraction of 'de + le'; functions as the preposition 'de' with a definite article, introducing the complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: Tu recherches un cadeau pour Lucas.

translations.fr: Tu recherches un cadeau pour Lucas.
translations.en: You're looking for a gift for Lucas.
translations.de: Du suchst ein Geschenk für Lucas.
translations.it: Stai cercando un regalo per Lucas.
translations.pt: Você está procurando um presente para o Lucas.
translations.vi: Bạn đang tìm một món quà cho Lucas.
translations.nl: Je zoekt een cadeau voor Lucas.
translations.hi: तुम लुकास के लिए एक उपहार ढूंढ रहे हो।
translations.el: Ψάχνεις ένα δώρο για τον Λούκας.
translations.nb: Du leter etter en gave til Lucas.
translations.id: Kamu sedang mencari hadiah untuk Lucas.
translations.sv: Du letar efter en present till Lucas.
translations.da: Du leder efter en gave til Lucas.
translations.ja: ルーカスへのプレゼントを探している。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular; transitive.
Indefinite article, masculine singular, determines 'cadeau'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'recherches'.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary/purpose complement.
Proper noun (given name); object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Nous recherchons une nounou pour samedi.

translations.fr: Nous recherchons une nounou pour samedi.
translations.en: We're looking for a nanny for Saturday.
translations.es: Buscamos una niñera para el sábado.
translations.de: Wir suchen eine Babysitterin für Samstag.
translations.yue: 我哋喺搵星期六嘅保姆。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando uma babá para sábado.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm người trông trẻ vào thứ bảy.
translations.ar: نحن نبحث عن مربية ليوم السبت.
translations.nl: We zoeken een oppas voor zaterdag.
translations.hi: हम शनिवार के लिए एक नैनी ढूंढ रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi leter etter barnevakt til lørdag.
translations.id: Kami mencari pengasuh anak untuk hari Sabtu.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter barnvakt till lördag.
translations.da: Vi leder efter en babysitter til lørdag.
translations.ja: 土曜日に来てくれるベビーシッターを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person plural.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, determines 'nounou'.
Common/informal noun, feminine; direct object of 'recherchons'.
Preposition introducing a temporal complement.
Common noun denoting a day; object of 'pour', marking time.

sentences.target: On va rechercher ce fichier plus tard.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ va ʁəʃɛʁʃe sə fiʃje ply taʁ/

translations.fr: On va rechercher ce fichier plus tard.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ va ʁəʃɛʁʃe sə fiʃje ply taʁ/
translations.en: We'll look for that file later.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们稍后再找那个文件。
translations.yue: 我哋稍後再搵嗰個檔案。
translations.pt: Vamos procurar esse arquivo mais tarde.
translations.he: נחפש את הקובץ הזה אחר כך.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi sẽ tìm tệp đó sau.
translations.hi: हम उस फ़ाइल को बाद में खोजेंगे।
translations.el: Θα ψάξουμε αυτό το αρχείο αργότερα.
translations.nb: Vi skal lete etter den filen senere.
translations.id: Kami akan mencari file itu nanti.
translations.sv: Vi ska leta efter den filen senare.
translations.ro: Vom căuta fișierul acela mai târziu.
translations.da: Vi vil lede efter den fil senere.
translations.ja: そのファイルはあとで探します。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun used as subject (often colloquial 'we').
Auxiliary verb (aller), present indicative, 3rd person singular, forming the periphrastic future with an infinitive.
Infinitive verb; complement of the auxiliary 'va' in the 'aller + infinitif' construction.
Demonstrative determiner, singular, modifies 'fichier'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'rechercher'.
Adverb modifying 'tard' in the fixed expression 'plus tard' (later).
Adverb of time; head of the adverbial phrase 'plus tard'.
